name: content-classification
description: Page type classification - identifies product page

request.body:
{"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are a content classification assistant."},{"role":"user","content":"Classify this webpage content:

---
Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch
Price: $2,499.00
In Stock: Yes
Features: M3 Pro chip, 18GB RAM, 512GB SSD
Add to Cart button available
---

What type of page is this? Options: product, article, blog, forum, search-results, other
Respond with just the page type."}],"model":"ministral-3:3b"}
